title: crepidomanes proliferum var. minutum
intro: Crepidomanes proliferum var. minutum, also known as the miniature creeping polypody, is a rare and endangered species of epiphytic fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Crepidomanes proliferum var. minutum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in tea infusions or as a component of herbal blends, although its availability and usage are limited due to conservation concerns.
